question: Does the generated output follow the requested interleaved structure: Introduction Text -> Panoramic Image -> Action Text -> Leaping Image -> Conclusion Text -> Resting Image?
Is the total word count of the generated text at least 500 words?
Does the introductory text explicitly describe the hardship of staking out in minus twenty degrees Celsius?
Does the first generated image function as a seamless outpainting of the input image, expanding the close-up into a panoramic shot showing the full body?
Does the first generated image depict the snow leopard in a rugged snowy mountain environment?
Does the second text passage describe a tense moment of the leopard spotting prey and springing into action?
Does the second generated image accurately depict a dynamic moment of the snow leopard leaping downward on a steep rock face?
Does the final text section provide a reflective conclusion about life and nature?
Does the third generated image clearly show the snow leopard resting and specifically licking its paws?
Do all generated images maintain visual consistency with the input image and each other (depicting the same snow leopard fur pattern, build, and environment)?
Does the generated text adopt a professional, descriptive tone suitable for a National Geographic wildlife photography journal?
Are all generated images free from significant AI artifacts (e.g., anatomical distortions, fused limbs) and of sufficient visual clarity?
Are the images placed at logical breakpoints, appearing immediately after the text segments that describe the specific scenes?
Do the visual details in the generated images semantically align with the descriptions provided in the adjacent text (e.g., action text paired with action image)?
